title: Cuneiform Tablet #0683: Old Akkadian Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
